Build QUEFTS biomass list from NFert state and Sentinel-2 NNI

Source: R/nfert_quefts_bridge.R
nfert_to_quefts_biom.Rd

Translates expected yield and per-pixel NNI into QUEFTS attainable biomass partitioning. NNI scales attainable storage biomass between a stressed and near-potential state.

Usage

nfert_to_quefts_biom(
  expected_yield_tons_ha,
  NNI,
  crop_pars,
  leaf_to_store_ratio = 0.42
)

Arguments

expected_yield_tons_ha

Numeric. Expected attainable yield (t/ha).

NNI

Numeric vector or scalar. Nitrogen Nutrition Index (typical range near 0.5–1.1).

crop_pars

Named list returned by nfert_to_quefts_crop().

leaf_to_store_ratio

Numeric. Leaf:store DM ratio for cereals. Default 0.42.

Value

If NNI has length 1, a single list with leaf_att, stem_att, store_att, SeasonLength. If NNI has length > 1, a list of such lists (one per element).

On this page

Developed by Michele Croci, Giorgio Impollonia, Andrea Ferrarini, Andrea Fiorini, Manuele Ragazzi, Nicolaj Franceschi, Vincenzo Tabaglio, Stefano Amaducci.
